name: Oatmeal Raisin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Mix the light corn syrup, water, vanilla extract, and egg whites in a large bowl until well combined.
3. Gradually blend in the brown sugar, granulated sugar, rolled oats, oat bran, unbleached white flour, whole wheat flour, and baking soda until the mixture forms a stiff dough.
4. Fold in the raisins until evenly distributed throughout the dough.
5. Drop spoonfuls of the dough onto a cookie sheet lightly sprayed with Baker's Joy.
6. Bake for 15-17 minutes or until the edges are browned.
7. Allow the cookies to cool on the baking sheet for a few minutes before transferring them to an airtight container. Store in a cool, dry place.
